Has the respondent ever made verbal or written threats either
generally or specifically in relation to this application?
Yes
No

other occupiers of the property?
Yes

Yes

Yes

Does the respondent hold a firearms licence or have any firearms

Yes

Page 4

If you have answered ‘Yes’ to any of the above, please give
further details below
Page 5

Statement of truth
I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be
brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false
statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without
an honest belief in its truth.
I believe that the facts stated in this form are true.
The applicant believes that the facts stated in this form are
true. I am authorised by the applicant to sign this statement.
Signature
Applicant
Applicant’s legal representative (as defined by FPR 2.3(1))
Date
Day Month Year
Full name
Name of applicant’s legal representative’s firm
If signing on behalf of firm or company give position or office held
Page 6

Applicant’s address or applicant’s legal representative’s address to Note: if you have previously
which documents should be sent. given your address to the
court and wish to keep
Building and street it confidential from the
respondent, please do not
enter it here

Town or city
County (optional)
Postcode
If applicable

Your reference

Page 7

metadata.title: Request a court bailiff to deliver papers: Form D89
metadata.description: Use this form to ask for a court bailiff to hand deliver papers to the other party in family court proceedings.
